title: Trump says Iran war will end 'very soon,' predicts lower oil prices
summary_full: U.S. stock market indexes rose earlier in the day after an initial report that President Donald Trump said he believed the Iran war was largely finished.
summary_public: U.S. stock market indexes rose earlier in the day after an initial report that President Donald Trump said he believed the Iran war was largely finished.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump says Iran war will end 'very soon,' predicts lower oil prices
